title: Fluorescence Multiplexing with Spectral Imaging and Combinatorics.
author: Holzapfel HY Stern AD Bouhaddou M Anglin CM Putur D Comer S Birtwistle MR
content: S-EPMC9827428 PMC9827428 Fluorescence Multiplexing with Spectral Imaging and Combinatorics. Ultraviolet-to-infrared fluorescence is a versatile and accessible assay modality but is notoriously hard to multiplex due to overlap of wide emission spectra.
